sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνάγω

- Transliteration: Anago

- Phonetic: an-ag'-o

- Definition:

1. to lead up, to lead or bring into a higher place

2. of navigators: launch out, set sail, put to sea

- Origin: from G303 and G71

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and G71; to lead up; by extension to bring out; specifically to sail away: - bring (again forth up again) depart launch (forth) lead (up) loose offer sail set forth take up.
